install_params.name: repository
install_params.label: Repository Name
install_params.description: The GitHub repository name to watch for pull requests

install_params.name: github_org
install_params.label: GitHub Organization
install_params.description: The GitHub organization or user that owns the repository

install_params.name: setup_script_url
install_params.label: Setup Script URL
install_params.description: Full URL to the script that sets up the preview environment on the droplet

install_params.name: ssh_secret
install_params.label: SSH Key Secret
install_params.description: Name of the SuperPlane secret containing the SSH private key for DigitalOcean
